key_findings: Article 10 (第十条) of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md establishes that the same invoice may be reimbursed at most once (同一发票最多报销1次).
Duplicate invoice occurrences across different reimbursement claims shall be identified as a duplicate reimbursement risk (重复报销风险).
Article 10 is located in Chapter 4 (Prohibited Provisions / 禁止性规定), making it a mandatory prohibition with no stated exceptions.
The policy is effective from 2025-01-01 and the 2022 version was simultaneously repealed (Article 14 / 第十四条).
No conflicting or overlapping invoice-reuse rules were found in other active policy documents; the 2022 policy is purely archival.
